title: linum biforme subsp. tenuifolium
intro: Linum biforme subsp. tenuifolium, also known as a subspecies of flax, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Linaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, Linum biforme subsp. tenuifolium is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to the skin or taken internally to reap its benefits.
